channel.title: Piqued - A Toki Ponist Adventure
channel.description: Grandmaster Guru Tipi lost his transcended level of consciousness, by stubbing his big toe. When his followers put him back in the mountains to find back his enlightenment, he meets lost 6-year old Julian. Now, while trying to get Julian home, Tipi has to figure out what The Mountain really means in his life.
channel.author: Awoken Well
channel.itunes:author: Awoken Well
channel.itunes:subtitle: A robot reading of the novel
channel.itunes:summary: Grandmaster Guru Tipi lost his transcended level of consciousness, by stubbing his big toe. When his followers put him back in the mountains to find back his enlightenment, he meets lost 6-year old Julian. Now, while trying to get Julian home, Tipi has to figure out what The Mountain really means in his life.
